verified_papers.title: Uncertainty Estimation of Large Language Models in Medical Question Answering
verified_papers.reason: The title and snippet directly address uncertainty estimation in medical QA using LLMs, focusing on hallucination detection and response reliability, which aligns with the topic of evaluating the credibility of LLM-based medical QA.

verified_papers.title: MedHallu: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Detecting Medical Hallucinations in Large Language Models
verified_papers.reason: The title and snippet focus on a benchmark for detecting medical hallucinations in LLMs, which is directly related to the topic of assessing the credibility and reliability of LLM-based medical QA systems.

verified_papers.title: MedExpQA: Multilingual benchmarking of Large Language Models for Medical Question Answering
verified_papers.reason: The title and snippet discuss benchmarking LLMs for medical QA, noting that models hallucinate in medical QA, which is relevant to the topic of credibility and reliability assessment.

verified_papers.title: Can Large Language Models Self-Correct in Medical Question Answering? An Exploratory Study
verified_papers.reason: The title and snippet explore self-correction in medical QA to improve reliability, which is directly related to the topic of enhancing the credibility of LLM-based medical QA systems.

verified_papers.title: Self-MedRAG: a Self-Reflective Hybrid Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Reliable Medical Question Answering
verified_papers.reason: The title and snippet describe a framework to improve the reliability of medical QA by reducing unsupported claims, which is directly related to the topic of ensuring the credibility of LLM-based medical QA.

verified_papers.title: RGAR: Recurrence Generation-augmented Retrieval for Factual-aware Medical Question Answering
verified_papers.reason: The title and snippet focus on improving the factual accuracy of LLM answers in medical QA, which is related to the topic of enhancing the credibility and reliability of LLM-based medical QA systems.
